description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Python package that runs on push and pull request events. Use an ubuntu-latest job with a matrix strategy to test multiple Python versions (3.7 to 3.10) in parallel. For each Python version, check out the repository, set up Python, install Poetry, and then use Poetry to install dependencies, build the package, run unit tests with pytest and coverage, lint with flake8, and perform additional tests and checks with tomodachi, mypy, and Codecov.
